config_file_list_t(3) Library Functions Manual config_file_list_t(3)

NAME

config_file_list_t - List of config file search results.

SYNOPSIS

#include <include/ascii-chat/platform/filesystem.h>

Data Fields


config_file_result_t * files
Array of results (allocated, must be freed). size_t count
Number of results found. size_t capacity
Allocated capacity.

Detailed Description

List of config file search results.

Contains all matching config files in priority order (highest priority first).

Definition at line 595 of file filesystem.h.

Field Documentation

size_t config_file_list_t::capacity

Allocated capacity.

Definition at line 598 of file filesystem.h.

Referenced by platform_find_config_file().

size_t config_file_list_t::count

Number of results found.

Definition at line 597 of file filesystem.h.

Referenced by check_known_host(), config_load_system_and_user(), and platform_find_config_file().

config_file_result_t* config_file_list_t::files

Array of results (allocated, must be freed).

Definition at line 596 of file filesystem.h.

Referenced by check_known_host(), config_load_system_and_user(), and platform_find_config_file().
